shared_files.note: Testing-only iteration — no builders, no source changes.

testing_plan.regression_reason: FEAT-047 acceptance overdue 5+ iterations (dispatch failures iters 72, 79, 83, 84, 85). FEAT-048 new UI from iter 86 — never acceptance tested. All Phase 4 P0 features complete — natural testing inflection point.

suites_to_run.method: static_analysis + tsc + eslint + curl + API probing
suites_to_run.notes: Baseline regression from iter 83 (23 checks). Verify nothing regressed from FEAT-048/IMP-012/IMP-013 additions.

checks: Runbooks API route exists: GET /api/v1/runbooks returns 401 for unauthed
Runbook-steps API route exists: GET /api/v1/runbook-steps returns 401 for unauthed
Runbooks POST route creates runbook from section (static analysis of route.ts POST handler)
Runbook GET by id returns runbook with steps (static analysis)
Runbook PATCH updates status (static analysis of [id]/route.ts PATCH handler)
RunbookStep PATCH updates step status (static analysis of runbook-steps/[id]/route.ts PATCH)
Runbook list page renders with filter tabs (static analysis of runbooks-list-view.tsx)
Runbook view page renders checklist with progress bar (static analysis of runbook-view.tsx)
4-state step status transitions: pending → in_progress → completed, pending → skipped (static analysis)
Complete/Cancel buttons use Radix Dialog confirmation (static analysis — IMP-012 verify)
Read-only mode for completed/cancelled runbooks (static analysis of runbook-view.tsx)
Section detail panel has 'Run as Checklist' button (static analysis of section-detail-panel.tsx)
Sidebar navigation includes runbooks link (static analysis of sidebar.tsx)
Runbook types defined: Runbook, RunbookStep, RunbookStatus, RunbookStepStatus (static analysis of database.ts)
Migration 016 creates runbooks + runbook_steps tables with RLS (file exists + structure check)
workspace-shell.tsx reserved paths includes 'runbooks' (static analysis)
suites_to_run.notes: 5+ consecutive dispatch failures. This acceptance test covers the full FEAT-047 feature (iters 80-82) plus IMP-012 (iter 86).

checks: Playbook page.tsx exists at correct route path (file existence check)
Playbook server page fetches runbook + steps via Supabase (static analysis of playbook/page.tsx)
PlaybookView renders fixed overlay (z-50) covering workspace shell (static analysis of playbook-view.tsx)
Mark Complete & Next button advances to next pending/in_progress step (static analysis)
Optimistic update with rollback on API error (static analysis of handleMarkComplete)
Dot navigation allows jumping to any step (static analysis)
Progress bar shows completion (static analysis)
Step N of M text displayed (static analysis)
Completed steps show green checkmark (static analysis)
Exit/back navigation returns to runbook view (static analysis)
Mobile-responsive layout (max-w-xl or similar constraint, static analysis)
Runbook view has 'Playbook' button linking to playbook route (static analysis of runbook-view.tsx)
suites_to_run.notes: New in iter 86 (attempt 3 after 2 pipeline merge failures). First acceptance test.

warnings_added: Migrations 014-016 still need `npx supabase db push` to deploy to remote DB
